top_signals.title: Oil Prices Soften as Traders Bet on Renewal of US-Iran Truce
top_signals.summary: Oil fell as the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend a ceasefire by 60 days, stoking optimism the Strait of Hormuz may soon reopen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How far is there to go until the US and Iran end the war?
top_signals.summary: A tentative deal has been reached to end the war and restart transit in the Strait of Hormuz, and then negotiations on more difficult issues would begin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
